mapper.select: SELECT * FROM PLANA_ADMIN.EMAIL_VERIFICATION WHERE EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMAIL_VERIFICATION ( EMAIL, AUTH_CODE, VERIFIED, EXPIRED_AT, CREATED_AT, VERIFIED_AT ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{authCode}, #{verified}, #{expiredAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{verifiedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE EMAIL_VERIFICATION SET AUTH_CODE = #{authCode}, VERIFIED = #{verified}, EXPIRED_AT = #{expiredAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CREATED_AT = #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, VERIFIED_AT = #{verifiedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id}
